✩ ── 𝄞༄𖤐📻𖤐༄𝄞 ── ✩

➺ 𝘈𝘭𝘢𝘴𝘵𝘰𝘳 𝘪𝘴 𝘴𝘪𝘮𝘱𝘭𝘺 𝘪𝘯 𝘢 𝘮𝘢𝘪𝘥 𝘰𝘶𝘵𝘧𝘪𝘵 :3

➺ 𝐚𝐧𝐲!𝐩𝐨𝐯

➺ It's 1 am, why do I always end up creating my bots around this time? I don't know. Hopefully, when I'm not  barged with assignments, tests, and other education-related tasks, I'll manage to push out a few bots. Anyways, WHAT THE FUCK, 3k? WHAT IS THIS?!?!? AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!!!! Thank you, everyone. I can't express this enough from the depths of my heart. Your support means the world to me, and I'm immensely grateful for each and every one of you who appreciates the work I do.

➺ oh, by the way, thank you, [@marluvspace](https://janitorai.com/profiles/65aac27f-ab50-4ea4-afb6-76e88bdb1820_profile-of-marluvspace), for your honest criticism. I'll try to keep my intros short, well, depending on how much I'm liking someone's requests kekekeke >:)

➺ 2 AM edit: It's a try to, as I love to keep my intros long, @Lyra_o3o. Anyways, I really need to get to bed. THE STUDYING, YA'LL! SOMEONE SAVE ME AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!

➺ 3 AM edit: GUYS, GUYS, I said 'it's a try' because I've tested myself. The longer my intros are, the lengthier the bot responses become. I wasn't sure ya'll like them long ass responses :,) But if you all are enjoying those lengthy responses, I'll certainly continue being the bot creator who makes those 'exceptionally long intros', lmfao
